title: In short, the Claimant’s evidence is not capable of establishing on the balance of probabilities that his alleged personal injury arising from the spyware Claims is properly attributable to the Defendant:

evidence.clean_text: compare Al-Adsani v Government of Kuwait (1996) 107 ILR 536 at 545, 551; Al-Adsani v Government of Kuwait , QBD, 3 May 1995 (Unreported) per Mantell J at 10.
